value.description: You have successfully completed all survivalist research projects and have advanced to tribal tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.

You have successfully completed all tribal research projects and have advanced to prospector tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.

You have successfully completed all prospector research projects and have advanced to settler tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.

You have successfully completed all settler research projects and have advanced to Vault-Tec tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.

You have successfully completed all Vault-Tec research projects and have advanced to Pre-War tech level. This will allow you to pick a Cornerstone - a powerful bonus that applies only to your civilization.
